adapters.selectors: prefer for long-running local orchestration,prefer when durable status surfaces are required
adapters.failure_notes: Same interpreter constraints as python-local still apply
adapters.fallback_notes: Fall back to python-local first, then shell-local if runtime surface support is unavailable
adapters.notes: Preferred adapter profile for durable long-running local tasks

adapters.selectors: prefer for local JSON tooling,good default for bounded probes
adapters.failure_notes: No module named usually means the active environment is incomplete
adapters.fallback_notes: Fall back to shell-local when only generic shell inspection is needed

adapters.selectors: prefer for local file transform contracts,prefer when validator reads transformed files
adapters.failure_notes: Transform contracts still depend on local filesystem writes
adapters.fallback_notes: Fall back to python-local or shell-local when transform-specific execution is unavailable
adapters.notes: Preferred adapter for local file transform execution contracts

adapters.selectors: prefer for generic shell inspection,use as broad fallback
adapters.failure_notes: PATH or command resolution issues may still apply

adapters.selectors: prefer for real shell command execution with experience accumulation
adapters.failure_notes: Real command execution — failures are classified and recorded for L2 path pruning
adapters.notes: Real shell execution adapter for Phase 1 experience loop

adapters.selectors: prefer for local file analysis contracts,prefer when validator independently re-reads source files
adapters.failure_notes: Analysis contracts depend on target file accessibility
adapters.fallback_notes: Fall back to python-local or shell-local when analysis-specific execution is unavailable
adapters.notes: Adapter for real file analysis with independent validation

rules.action: Stop and reduce scope instead of retrying the blocked path

patterns.summary: Local repair branches should stay probe-only and feed explicit recovery references
